docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, N.R. AS TO DEFENDANT NEELY, ERIC DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, N.R. SERVED JUL-19-1993, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NEELY, ERIC
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $80.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, N.R. AS TO DEFENDANT NEELY, ERIC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATEL, N.R. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEELY, ERIC THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 74 SIXTH ST.#250, LEASE FORFEITED
